title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Brandi wakes up on the wrong side of the bed but makes the best of it, and Ivy grabs a second locker. Meanwhile, Kenny finds something precious.

desc: Take a look at a band from Kerala who use bamboo instruments to produce music. Also explore innovative drones made by the geniuses from IIT Delhi.

desc: Paratrooper Special Forces demonstrate the basics of covert missions and the CBRN team comes to the rescue after a dirty bomb is released to emit toxic gases.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Two buyers get into a bidding war over an old Ford Econoline. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli witness a BMW motorcycle loaded with history.

title: India: Marvels & Mysteries With William Dalrymple
desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

title: The Einstein Challenge
desc: Renowned historians Dr Tanya Roth and Brandon Gauthier explore pivotal World War II events. Furthermore, they shed light on the D-Day invasion and the breaking of the Enigma code.

title: Food Tech
desc: The host explores different types of Mexican cuisine, which includes foods and drinks such as tequila, refried beans, guacamole and tortillas.

title: The Fast History Of
desc: The filmmaker sets on a fast-paced journey to look into the pasts of legendary companies to fascinating subjects like UFOs and the daily lives of billionaires.

desc: A competitor tries to prove that his antique Barong can survive the course. However, a kukri and Bowie hybrid may show that two blade styles are better than one.

desc: The host sheds light on Indian culture by travelling across the country to explore food, rituals, traditions and some rare talents.

desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Roads Unknown: India
desc: After a crash leaves Zombie injured, the crew scrambles to stay on schedule for Ridermania. Meanwhile, Jess is met with overwhelming support from fans and fellow riders at the festival.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host showcases a high-tech farming revolution, a miniature food artist and the world's first elephant-friendly tea estate.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: The notorious drug kingpin El Chapo is still remembered in history for his audacious escape attempts from maximum-security prisons in Mexico.

desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

desc: After discovering a locker with potential, Rene steps over the opponents. Meanwhile, Kenny uses different tactics to boost his profit and Brandi struggles to find units that could be beneficial.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Out in Hesperia, California, when Mary faces transportation troubles, she decides to team up with Kenny and takes him out to pasture.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Top bladesmiths from different walks of life compete to create the best weapons and prove their effectiveness in a series of daunting challenges.

title: Ancient Aliens
desc: The filmmaker tries to understand if aliens from the tiny star like Sirius B visited humans in the distant past in order to impart the knowledge of civilisation.

title: American Pickers
desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz meet an eccentric prince who only answers to an otherworldly authority. Later, they explore a man cave full of extraodinary finds.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: After Jenn attempts to drive a decked-out armored assault vehicle to its buyer, the ride turns out to be little more than she bargained for.

desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: A submarine car from the James Bond movie turns up in the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler negotiate a deal with an antique store.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Danny and his team tackle a 1960s Cadillac restoration, aiming to match its interior with a bold root beer paint job. Meanwhile, Jeff Blando seeks the final touches for his custom chopper.

title: The Toys That Built The World
desc: 1990s gave birth to numerous fad toys like Furby, Tamagotchi, Beanie Babies and various virtual pets that still remains unforgotten by time.

title: History's Greatest Mysteries
desc: The team investigates historical accounts of Hitler's suicide. However, speculation grows about his possible escape, challenging the accepted narrative of his demise in Berlin.

desc: In the pink city of Jaipur, Samira visits a medieval fort, enjoys high tea with a local businessman and obtains Rajasthani royal recipes from the city's top chefs.

title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

desc: The host travels to Uttarakhand to explore its unique culture and traditions while experiencing the beauty and relishing the cuisine like the locals.

desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

desc: The filmmaker sheds light on peculiar places like a city where a zipline is required to commute, a town that is crawling with monkeys and a waterfall of blood.
